description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a low, light-colored fence and a well-maintained yard with green grass and several mature trees. The exterior features a combination of smooth gray siding and white trim, with large rectangular windows and a flat roof. The front of the house has a small porch with steps leading up to a prominent entryway, flanked by decorative shrubs and trees. A spacious balcony with a railing is visible on the upper floor, providing outdoor living space. The backyard includes a bench and open grassy area, while the side yard is landscaped with tall, conical bushes. The overall design is clean and geometric, emphasizing horizontal and vertical lines.
description: A modern two-story house with gray siding, large windows, a flat roof, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low fence. Features include a front porch, upper balcony, and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, upper balcony, and lush landscaping with two prominent trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony, flat roof, and tall conical bushes along the fence line.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a bench, open grassy area, and large windows on the upper floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the flat roof, gray siding, and mature tree near the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, overhang, and flanked by decorative shrubs and trees
